description: Mesa County / Western Slope Colorado PHA overrides for ProgramGate_HUDVASH_HCV_S8. Pilot deployment for SQUAD Battalion.

jurisdiction.phaName: Housing Authority of the City of Grand Junction

hudVashSpecialRestrictions: Confirm current HUD-VASH unit availability with Grand Junction VA Medical Center social work team
HUD-VASH vouchers administered through Grand Junction Housing Authority — confirm current waitlist status before routing

exceptionPaymentStandard.eligibilityNotes: Contact Grand Junction Housing Authority for exception payment standard eligibility

leaseTerm.notes: Initial lease minimum 12 months standard for HUD-VASH; confirm with PHA for current policy

data._note: Payment standards below are PLACEHOLDERS. Source actual values from HUD FMR tables at https://www.huduser.gov/portal/datasets/fmr.html — Mesa County, CO. Verify with Grand Junction Housing Authority before use. Do NOT use these zeros to make eligibility decisions.

utilityAllowanceSchedule._note: Utility allowance schedules must be sourced from Grand Junction Housing Authority directly. Values below are PLACEHOLDERS.

contacts._note: Verify all contacts before use — phone numbers and staff change.

pha.name: Housing Authority of the City of Grand Junction
pha.hud_vash_liaison: Contact Grand Junction VA Medical Center social work team for current HUD-VASH coordinator

va_medical_center.name: Grand Junction VA Medical Center
va_medical_center.social_work: Ask for Social Work Service for HUD-VASH referrals

ssvf_providers._note: SSVF grantees for Western Slope CO — verify current active grantees at https://www.va.gov/homeless/ssvf/

notes: PILOT DEPLOYMENT — Western Slope Colorado, Mesa County
All PLACEHOLDER values must be replaced with verified data before routing veterans to housing decisions
Payment standards: source from HUD FMR at https://www.huduser.gov/portal/datasets/fmr.html
Utility allowances: request current schedule from Grand Junction Housing Authority
SSVF providers: verify current grantee list at https://www.va.gov/homeless/ssvf/
